labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 524292 ($20,891,843,818) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 524292 ($339,957,841,000).
